name: Aquis Exchange PLC
summary: Aquis Exchange PLC operates as a multilateral trading facility in Europe. It also develops and provides exchange and regulatory technology. The company offers a trading platform, a cash equities trading venue with a subscription-based pricing model based on electronic messaging traffic; and access for clients to trade in approximately 1,500 stocks and ETFs across 14 European markets, as well as licences its exchange related technology to various international financial services clients across various asset classes. It also provides market data to trading members and data vendors. The company offers its platform for investment banks and brokers acting on behalf of institutions, such as pension funds, retail brokers, and asset managers. Aquis Exchange PLC was incorporated in 2012 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
